charts.name: How to use this dashboard
charts.text: Start with server errors and slow routes. Drill into service, route, status, trace_id, taskId, teamId, and diaryId. Metrics live in the separate MoltNet Metrics dashboard.

query.apl:
['moltnet']
| extend status = toint(['attributes.http.response.status_code'])
| where status >= 500
| summarize Value = count() by bin_auto(_time)

['moltnet']
| extend service = tostring(['service.name'])
| extend route = tostring(['attributes.route'])
| extend status = toint(['attributes.http.response.status_code'])
| where status >= 500
| summarize errors = count() by service, route, status
| top 20 by errors

['moltnet']
| extend service = tostring(['service.name'])
| extend status = toint(['attributes.http.response.status_code'])
| where status >= 500
| summarize errors = count() by service, bin_auto(_time)

['moltnet']
| extend service = tostring(['service.name'])
| extend route = tostring(['attributes.route'])
| summarize p95 = percentile(todouble(['duration']), 95), count = count() by service, route
| top 20 by p95

['moltnet']
| where isnotempty(['attributes.taskId'])
| project _time, ['service.name'], ['attributes.route'], ['attributes.taskId'], ['attributes.teamId'], trace_id, severity_text, body
| take 100

['moltnet']
| extend service = tostring(['service.name'])
| extend route = tostring(['attributes.route'])
| extend status = toint(['attributes.http.response.status_code'])
| where status in (401, 403, 404)
| summarize count = count() by service, route, status
| top 20 by count

['moltnet']
| where ['body'] == 'agent-runtime.task_claimed'
| extend queue_ms = todouble(['attributes.queueToClaimMs'])
| where isnotnull(queue_ms)
| summarize Value = percentile(queue_ms, 50), p95 = percentile(queue_ms, 95)

charts.name: Queue to first Pi activity (P50 / P95 ms)

query.apl:
['moltnet']
| where ['body'] == 'turn.info'
| where tostring(['attributes.event']) == 'first_pi_activity'
| extend latency_ms = todouble(['attributes.queueToFirstActivityMs'])
| where isnotnull(latency_ms)
| summarize Value = percentile(latency_ms, 50), p95 = percentile(latency_ms, 95)

charts.name: VM acquire latency by snapshot cache state

query.apl:
['moltnet']
| where ['body'] == 'turn.info'
| where tostring(['attributes.event']) == 'runtime_timing' and tostring(['attributes.stage']) == 'vm_acquired'
| extend cache_state = iff(tobool(['attributes.snapshotCacheHit']), 'warm', 'cold')
| extend latency_ms = todouble(['attributes.durationMs'])
| summarize p50 = percentile(latency_ms, 50), p95 = percentile(latency_ms, 95) by cache_state

['moltnet']
| where ['name'] startswith 'chat '
| extend prompt_tokens = todouble(['attributes.gen_ai.usage.input_tokens'])
| where isnotnull(prompt_tokens)
| summarize Value = percentile(prompt_tokens, 50), p95 = percentile(prompt_tokens, 95)

['moltnet']
| where ['body'] == 'turn.info'
| where tostring(['attributes.event']) == 'session_summary'
| extend turns = todouble(['attributes.turnCount'])
| summarize Value = percentile(turns, 50), p95 = percentile(turns, 95)

charts.name: Snapshot, VM, and session setup P95

query.apl:
['moltnet']
| where ['body'] == 'turn.info'
| where tostring(['attributes.event']) == 'runtime_timing'
| extend stage = tostring(['attributes.stage'])
| extend latency_ms = todouble(['attributes.durationMs'])
| summarize p50 = percentile(latency_ms, 50), p95 = percentile(latency_ms, 95) by stage

description: Operational drilldown over the moltnet traces/logs dataset, including agent runtime queue, setup, prompt, and turn latency.
name: MoltNet Traces and Logs
